text: This study aimed to reveal the moral values of man to God, human moral values to themselves, and human moral values to fellow human beings in the novel KKN in Desa Penari by Simpleman. This research is a qualitative study with a descriptive method. The data used in this study are the language data derived from the dialogue and actions of the characters in the novel KKN in Desa Penari by Simpleman. The data source used in this study is the novel KKN in Desa Penari by Simpleman. The instrument used in this study is the researcher himself. Based on the analysis results obtained 23 moral values related to man to God, 36 moral values related to man to himself, and 47 moral values related to man to his fellow human beings. The implication for Indonesian language learning is that it can be implied through the Learning Implementation Plan (RPP) and Teaching Material with KD 3.9 analyzing the content and language of the novel read with the indicator that students can identify intrinsic, extrinsic and linguistic elements in a novel
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
